description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light oak finish, featuring a minimalist design. The front side displays two large, flat doors with a subtle vertical seam, lacking any visible handles for a sleek appearance. The back and sides are plain, showcasing the natural wood grain pattern. The opposite side to the doors reveals three drawers, each with a small, round, dark knob, indicating dual access functionality. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing additional items. The overall construction suggests it is designed for storage in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment hallways.
description: A light oak-finished wooden cabinet with two front doors and three rear drawers, featuring a minimalist, dual-access design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, handleless doors with a vertical seam.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wooden panel with visible wood grain.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing three drawers, each with a small round knob.
description_view_3: Right side view showing another plain wooden panel with wood grain.
